summary: Completed frontend testing of Daily Projection Table updates for licensees. All features working correctly: Manager Traded column shows ✓/✗ icons, Actual Profit/Commission/P/L Diff columns hidden for licensees, Target Profit shows '--' when manager didn't trade, balance carries forward correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Projection Table updates verified: 1) Licensees (Extended and Honorary) see columns: Date, Balance Before, LOT Size, Target Profit, Manager Traded. 2) Non-licensees see columns: Date, Balance Before, LOT Size, Target Profit, Actual Profit, Commission, P/L Diff. 3) Manager Traded column shows green checkmark (✓) when master admin traded, red X (✗) when not traded. 4) Target Profit shows '--' when manager didn't trade. 5) Balance carries forward (no profit added) when manager didn't trade. 6) Legend at bottom explains the icons for licensees.

manager_traded_column_for_licensees.details: Manager Traded column visible for both Extended and Honorary licensees with ✓/✗ icons

hidden_columns_for_licensees.details: Actual Profit, Commission, P/L Diff columns are hidden for licensees

target_profit_dash_when_no_trade.details: Target Profit shows '--' when manager didn't trade on that day

balance_carry_forward.details: Balance carries forward correctly when manager didn't trade (no profit added)

non_licensee_columns.details: Non-licensees (Master Admin) see all columns: Actual Profit, Commission, P/L Diff

legend_explanation.details: Legend at bottom explains ✓ = Manager traded, ✗ = Manager did not trade, '--' = no trade made
